items.title: Is it a given that if Tyler Herro goes then Norman Powell returns for Heat? Latest "Ask Ira" at  www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/06/04/a... Plus: Living in the past; the Silver factor.
items.author: Ira Winderman
items.body_excerpt: Is it a given that if Tyler Herro goes then Norman Powell returns for Heat? Latest "Ask Ira" at  www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/06/04/a... Plus: Living in the past; the Silver factor.

media.title: ASK IRA: Is it a given that if Tyler Herro goes then Norman Powell returns for Heat?
media.description: Q: I’m trying not to get my hopes up, but it’s seeming more and more likely that we could end up with Giannis Antetokounmpo. It also appears Tyler Herro, Jaime Jaquez Jr. and Kel’el Ware will be gone ...
